name: SIMFIT STUDIO
subtitle: Gym · Strength & Conditioning
tagline: A boutique strength studio in Leeds — real coaching, small classes, and no crowded gym floor.

services.name: Personal Training
services.desc: One-to-one blocks built around your goals and your schedule.

services.name: Strength Classes
services.desc: Coached barbell and dumbbell sessions, capped at eight people.

services.name: HIIT
services.desc: 30-minute conditioning blasts to build engine and burn off the week.

services.name: Nutrition Plan
services.desc: Simple, sustainable eating guidance — no fad diets, no shakes.

services.name: Onboarding
services.desc: Two sessions to teach the lifts and set your baseline. New members only.

services.name: Membership
services.desc: Unlimited classes, members app, and a free programme review each month.

about.title: Strength without the noise.
paragraphs: SimFit Studio opened because we were tired of gyms that sell you a contract and forget your name. We built the studio we wanted instead.
Our coaches actually coach — they watch your form, adjust the plan, and keep classes small enough to notice.
No mirrors-to-the-ceiling, no juice-bar upsell. Just training that works, with people who care.

whyChoose.text: Coached sessions — real form checks, not a QR code
Classes capped at eight — you're never lost in the room
Qualified, insured coaches with a plan for every level

reviews.name: Hannah W.
reviews.text: First gym where I've actually stuck with it. The coaches know exactly where I'm at.

reviews.name: Dean M.
reviews.text: PT blocks got me my first pull-up at 41. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: Small classes mean no hiding at the back. Best decision for my strength.
